label: Memory budget percent
description: Operational memory budget as a percentage of total memory for this repository's heavy checks.

label: Swap storage percent
description: Maximum free-storage percentage to treat as the repository swap budget.

label: Swap GiB limit
description: GiB cap for the repository swap budget.

label: Maximum parallel jobs
description: Auto or a positive integer selected by the user.

label: Resource mode
description: automatic, serial, or parallel.

label: Available memory floor percent
description: Serial fallback is recommended when available memory drops below this percent of the repository memory budget.

label: Cleanup safe delete enabled
description: Allow explicit repo-local safe cleanup when the command uses --safe.

label: Cleanup older-than hours
description: Delete safe cleanup targets regardless of age when zero; otherwise require target age to exceed this many hours.

label: Cleanup requires explicit safe flag
description: Require --safe before any cleanup deletion can occur.

label: Record only
description: Record repository swap-budget usage at ten percent.

label: Record only
description: Record repository swap-budget usage at twenty percent.

label: Record only
description: Record repository swap-budget usage at thirty percent.

label: Record only
description: Record repository swap-budget usage at forty percent.

label: Notice
description: Show a notice at fifty percent.

label: Warning
description: Show a warning at sixty percent.

label: Strong warning
description: Show a strong warning at seventy percent.

label: Stop new parallel work
description: Do not start new heavy parallel work at eighty percent.

label: Serial fallback or safe stop
description: Return the next phase to serial execution or safe stop at ninety percent.

label: Git hooks full verification
description: Estimated MiB budget per parallel job for full Git hooks verification.

label: Playwright browser checks
description: Estimated MiB budget per parallel job for browser-based checks.

label: Aggregate lesson checks
description: Estimated MiB budget per parallel job for aggregate repository checks.

label: Default heavy work
description: Estimated MiB budget per parallel job for unspecified heavy checks.

label: playwright
description: Repo-local Playwright HTML report directory.

label: playwright
description: Repo-local Playwright test result directory.

label: git-hooks-full
description: Marked repo-local Git hooks cache directory.

label: aggregate
description: Marked repo-local same-run CI evidence directory.
